rationale: The primary technical signal is fundamentally contradictory: it indicates a SHORT direction, yet the provided Stop, Target, and calculated Risk/Reward (2.0x) are consistent with a LONG trade. Furthermore, zero independent strategies actually agree with the SHORT direction, with one even suggesting LONG. This makes the core technical signal unreliable and un-tradeable, despite recent news headlines consistently reporting downward pressure on the FTSE 100 due to global economic concerns.
